nodes.label: Trainer that handles both RL training and inference through Tinker API.     Con
Register this trainer with the Atropos API server.
Fetch a batch of rollouts from Atropos API with retry logic.
Convert Atropos batch into Tinker Datums for training.          Pads logprobs
Poll Atropos for a batch of rollouts and convert to Tinker Datums.         Wait
Execute one training step: fetch batch, forward-backward, optimizer step.
OpenAI-compatible completions endpoint.     Called by inference server wrapper
OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint.     Called by inference server wra
/generate endpoint for ManagedServer.     Called by ManagedServer with tokenize
Run FastAPI server in background thread.
